description_long: This object is a tall, rectangular structure with a wood-paneled exterior framed by a dark metal or composite material. The front features a square opening with a metallic or plastic trim, and a small plaque or sign is mounted to the left of the opening. Below the opening, there is a pictogram of a person disposing of trash, suggesting a waste-related function. The sides and back are similarly paneled but lack signage or pictograms. The top is flat and slightly recessed, bordered by the same dark material as the frame. The overall design is modern and utilitarian, suitable for public urban environments.
description: A tall, wood-paneled structure with a dark frame, front opening, and signage, designed for public urban use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the square opening, a metallic plaque, and a pictogram of a person disposing of trash.
description_view_1: Side view with the opening visible but no signage or pictogram, showing only the wood paneling and frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with the opening but no signage or pictogram.
description_view_3: Rear view, showing only the wood paneling and frame, with no opening, signage, or pictogram.
attribute_window_configuration: one square opening on the front side
attribute_signage_or_labeling: metallic plaque and pictogram on the front, left of and below the opening
